panels.description:
Ingested metrics (avg): Total rate of metrics received per receiver  

Metrics refusal rate (avg): Rate of metrics refused  

Ingested logs (avg): Total rate of logs received per receiver  

Logs refusal rate (avg): Rate of logs refused  

Ingested spans (avg): Total rate of spans received per receiver  

Spans refusal rate (avg): Rate of spans refused

targets.expr:
(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
  + sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
)
or
(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
  unless sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
)
or
(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
  unless sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
)
or
(
  count by (receiver) ({service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id",receiver!=""}) * 0
)

(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
  + sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_log_records_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
)
or
(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
  unless sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_log_records_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
)
or
(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_log_records_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
  unless sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
)
or
(
  count by (receiver) ({service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id",receiver!=""}) * 0
)

(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_spans_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
  + sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_spans_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
)
or
(
  sum by (receiver) (rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_spans_total{service_name!="",service_name=~"$service_name",service_instance_id=~"$service_instance_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Receivers

panels.description:
**Note: This table only makes sense when selecting a single collector as queue sizes may differ**
Shows metrics of the internal [sending queue](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/blob/main/exporter/exporterhelper/README.md) per exporter
